compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\Pedro Polo\\Documents\\GitHub.serviceRawFile:
service: ecommerce-muebles-ar-backend

useDotenv: true

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: us-east-1
  environment:
    DATABASE_URL: ${env:DATABASE_URL}
  httpApi:
    authorizers:
      cognitoAuthorizer:
        type: jwt
        identitySource: $request.header.Authorization
        issuerUrl: https://cognito-idp.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/us-east-1_3wUuOTyhl
        audience:
          - 2cv3c6ugmn0qg33h64s8n6iqlq

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

functions:
  getCategories:
    handler: src/products/getCategories.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /categories
          method: GET

  getProducts:
    handler: src/products/getProducts.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products
          method: GET

  getProductById:
    handler: src/products/getProductById.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products/{id}
          method: GET

  whoami:
    handler: src/auth/whoami.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /whoami
          method: GET
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  getFavorites:
    handler: src/favorites/getFavorites.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /favorites
          method: GET
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  addFavorite:
    handler: src/favorites/addFavorite.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /favorites
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  removeFavorite:
    handler: src/favorites/removeFavorite.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /favorites/{productId}
          method: DELETE
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer
